message:
feat(cli,db,tools): search service enhancements, messaging improvements, and CLI refinements

- cli/lib.rs: CLI argument handling improvements
- search_service.rs: additional search service query capabilities
- macros.rs: macro tool enhancements
- messaging.rs: message handling improvements
- search.rs: search tool query refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
